title: Amphenol Corporation: Wired For Success
text: Amphenol has had a successful run, increasing the company revenues in each of the last four consecutive years. It carries a medium amount of long-term debt, which has continuously grown since 2018.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For March 2022
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of March.
